input: Check SLA compliance for all open tickets and flag any breaches.
expectedOutput: SLA compliance report with breach list and recommended escalations

trace.input: Check SLA compliance for all open tickets and flag any breaches.
trace.output: SLA check: 42 open tickets. 3 breaches: TKT-1082 (P1, 4h overdue), TKT-1091 (P2, 2h overdue), TKT-1103 (P1, 1h overdue). Escalation recommended for P1 tickets.

input: Route an incoming complex request through the multi-step handoff workflow.
expectedOutput: Completed handoff chain with tool invocations and state transitions

trace.input: Route an incoming complex request through the multi-step handoff workflow.
trace.output: Request routed and completed through 3-step handoff. Final status: resolved.

steps.input: Classify the incoming request by type and priority.
Assign to the appropriate on-call team based on classification.
steps.output: Assigned to infra-oncall-team-west. Ticket TKT-2201 created.

steps.input: Confirm assignment and send notification to requester.
steps.output: Notification sent. ETA: 2 hours. Requester acknowledged.

trace.finalOutput: Multi-step handoff complete: P2 infra request classified, assigned to infra-oncall-west (TKT-2201), requester notified with 2-hour ETA.
